title: Loops and Block/Rescue Error Handling
description: Write a playbook that uses loop to install packages, and block/rescue/always for error-safe service configuration.
starterCode:
---
# Write a playbook that:
# 1. Installs packages [nginx, git, curl] using a loop with ansible.builtin.package
# 2. Uses a block/rescue/always structure to:
#    - block: deploy a config template to /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
#    - rescue: print 'Config deployment failed' with ansible.builtin.debug
#    - always: ensure nginx service is started

- name: Resilient web server setup
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install required packages
      # Add loop here

    # Add block/rescue/always here
solutionCode:
---
- name: Resilient web server setup
  hosts: webservers
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install required packages
      ansible.builtin.package:
        name: "{{ item }}"
        state: present
      loop:
        - nginx
        - git
        - curl

    - name: Configure nginx safely
      block:
        - name: Deploy nginx config
          ansible.builtin.template:
            src: nginx.conf.j2
            dest: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      rescue:
        - name: Alert on failure
          ansible.builtin.debug:
            msg: 'Config deployment failed'
      always:
        - name: Ensure nginx is started
          ansible.builtin.service:
            name: nginx
            state: started
hints: Use 'loop:' with a YAML list under the package task
Reference the loop variable with '{{ item }}'
block:/rescue:/always: are at the same indentation as 'name:'
always: runs whether block succeeded or failed

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a 'loop:' keyword to iterate over packages
Use '{{ item }}' to reference the current loop item
Add a 'rescue:' section for error handling
Add an 'always:' section that runs regardless of outcome
YAML is invalid — check block/rescue/always indentation

changed: [web1] => (item=git)
changed: [web1] => (item=curl)

TASK [Deploy nginx config] *****************************
changed: [web1]

TASK [Ensure nginx is started] *************************
ok: [web1]

PLAY RECAP *********************************************
web1 : ok=3  changed=2  unreachable=0  failed=0
simulatedOutput.failure: ERROR! Check loop syntax, block/rescue/always structure, and YAML indentation.
